identify.supportBoundary: identify/profile reads only file names, container magics, and script signatures

inventory.supportBoundary: enumerates the PAC entry table (or the loose SCRIPT.SRC/TEXT.DAT pair); text extraction is claimed only for the script/text surfaces

extract.supportBoundary: extracts the TEXT-SHOW (dialogue) + text-bearing SELECT (choice) surfaces of SCRIPT.SRC, resolving 4-byte TEXT.DAT pointers to decoded cp932 lines; the same production Sv20 decode also reports evidence-backed named Pal.dll call targets (message, choice, sprite/render, sound/video, button/input, and effect operations), while unproven targets remain raw dispatch keys

patch.supportBoundary: dialogue + choice text is patched back by rebuilding TEXT.DAT (re-encrypting when the original was) and repointing SCRIPT.SRC as loose files; PAC repack, speaker-name/non-text surfaces, and the full Sv20 opcode table are not claimed
